params.name: api_key
params.description: AirLabs API key from the account dashboard.

params.name: city_code
params.description: IATA metropolitan city code (e.g. NYC, LON, PAR).

params.name: country_code
params.description: ISO 2 country code (e.g. US, GB, FR).

params.name: _fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

items.docs: Returns a list of cities, optionally filtered by IATA metropolitan city_code, ISO 2 country_code, or restricted to a specified set of fields.
